title: Rissho Ankoku Ron: Establishing the Right Dharma
description: Nichiren's prophetic treatise: the calamities afflicting Japan are caused by abandoning the true dharma of the Lotus Sutra.
introduction: Nichiren's prophetic treatise: the calamities afflicting Japan are caused by abandoning the true dharma of the Lotus Sutra.

translation.text: If the nation turns to the true dharma, the three disasters and seven calamities will cease.
